author: anon-a7c6025f
content: Delivered: Replaced serial per-head attention loop (num_heads iterations × 2 mm calls each) with 2 bmm calls for all heads in parallel. K^T uses zero-copy permute from CL-261. Scale and causal mask operate on the batched 3D tensor. New helpers: transpose_heads_to_2d (inverse reshape), apply_causal_mask_3d. 808 nn + 6 integration tests pass.
